Video.summary: A stray dog loyal to Bill Gentry is the only witness in the murder of Susan Sayres's father.
Video.title: The Third Passenger

Video.summary: Two outlaws set upon Maggie Woolf and her father who are taking refuge from a storm.
Video.title: Storm Over Truckee

Video.summary: Ex-outlaw Belle Starr goes after the D.A. who ridiculed her illiterate husband.
Video.title: A Bullet for the D.A.

Video.summary: A reporter probes reports that a general is selling guns to Natives in exchange for their property.
Video.title: The Truth Teller

Video.summary: An unarmed Navajo sets out to avenge the murder and robbery of a Native elder.
Video.title: Experiment in Fear

Video.summary: A prospector has hit a vein, and he's not about to share it with anyone, not even his partner.
Video.title: The Breaking Point

Video.summary: The story of Amadeo Giannini and the creation of the Bank of America.
Video.title: The Unshakable Man

Video.summary: Plagued by gold thefts, Denver bankers set up their own mint in the bank basement.
Video.title: The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.

Image.alt: The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.

Video.summary: Attorney William E. Borah defends a woman charged with murder in Nampa, Idaho.
Video.title: The Lion of Idaho

Video.summary: An outlaw and teamster help miners.
Video.title: The Debt

Video.summary: Crew chief Yank Van Duzen walks off a mining job in protest when the foremen ignore warnings.
Video.title: Grotto of Death

Video.summary: An attorney takes the case of a famed gunman who is charged with murder.
Video.title: Diamond Field Jack

Video.summary: Hunting a large, mysterious creature.
Video.title: The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek

Image.alt: The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek

Video.summary: Winfield Stratton finds gold just after selling his mining claim to a syndicate.
Video.title: Sixty-Seven Miles of Gold

Video.summary: A San Francisco newspaperman with big plans struggles to make his business profitable.
Video.title: The Paper Dynasty

Video.summary: Mary likes the attention of many men, but that causes trouble when one is murdered over her.
Video.title: Queen of Spades

Video.summary: A man's resemblance to a killer lands him in jail and facing a murder charge.
Video.title: Alias James Stuart

Video.summary: Jeremy is a crew member on a blackbirding ship that inhumanely captures and enslaves native peoples.
Video.title: Showdown at Kamaaina Flats

Video.summary: A 15-year-old joins the Texas revolutionaries to avenge Davy Crockett's death at the Alamo.
Video.title: Davy's Friend

Video.summary: A missionary puts himself on the line to mediate a conflict between settlers and Navajo.
Video.title: The Peacemaker

Video.summary: A charlatan rainmaker sparks a range war.
Video.title: Big John and the Rainmaker

Video.summary: A pioneer fends off a trapper's persistent offers to buy the pioneer's Indian wife.
Video.title: From the Earth, a Heritage

Video.summary: An Indian girl must save a treaty.
Video.title: The Other White Man

Video.summary: Native brothers must find a tribal renegade.
Video.title: Death in the Desert

Video.summary: A Navy officer faces down a vigilante mob.
Video.title: The Battle of San Francisco Bay

Image.alt: The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay
The Battle of San Francisco Bay

Video.summary: Ronald Reagan plays a sheriff who tries enforcing the law without a gun.
Video.title: No Gun Behind His Badge

Video.summary: The appointed warden of a Nevada prison tries to apprehend three notorious escaped convicts.
Video.title: Temporary Warden

Video.summary: A Native woman plans revenge after her husband is killed by thieves.
Video.title: The Captain Dick Mine

Video.summary: A mail delivery rider attempts to help a widow find the right man to marry.
Video.title: The Rider

Video.summary: A crew of mine developers ingeniously races against time to make it from Arizona to San Diego.
Video.title: A City Is Born

Video.summary: Challenges are faced as a boat on wheels travels across the prairie and through Native country.
Video.title: Dry Water Sailors

Video.summary: Everyone's deserting wagon master Ezra Meeker - except his wife and an accused murderer.
Video.title: Devil's Gate

Video.summary: A woman whose house is hit by a meteorite decides to sue God for damages.
Video.title: Canary Harris vs. the Almighty

Video.summary: A freight hauler marries a rich girl by mistake and has a week to court her before it is annulled.
Video.title: The Courtship of Carrie Huntington

Video.summary: Huldah Swanson is traveling west to meet her fiancé with $1000 sewn in her hat.
Video.title: The Hat That Huldah Wore

Video.summary: A society woman takes over a wagon train when the wagon master is killed in a raid.
Video.title: Lady of the Plains

Video.summary: Ignoring his brother's warnings, young Roy Bean gets involved in a rivalry over a pretty girl.
Video.title: Sense of Justice

Video.summary: Lured by promises of gold, prospectors provide a wounded outlaw with aid and an alibi.
Video.title: The Man Who Didn't Want Gold

Image.alt: The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold
The Man Who Didn't Want Gold

Video.summary: An ex-convict is hired by Animas City to be their marshal.
Video.title: Halo for a Badman

Video.summary: A widowed magician saves his young apprentice.
Video.title: The Saga of Dr. Davis

Video.summary: Warren takes an unreasonable dislike to his stepmother after returning to his father's ranch.
Video.title: Siege at Amelia's Kitchen

Video.summary: A recruit and his pet mule are the only hope for a besieged cavalry patrol.
Video.title: Honor the Name Dennis Driscoll

Video.summary: Deputy Jim Brand hatches a plan to thwart a corrupt railroad lawyer.
Video.title: The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup

Image.alt: The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup

Video.summary: The theft of turkeys being brought to market sets up a showdown between lawlessness and justice.
Video.title: The Great Turkey War
